hero.subtitle: Plan routines, track your workouts, and analyze your progress. All in one place.

showcase.title: Everything you need to train better
showcase.subtitle: From planning to analysis, Gym Diary is with you every step of the way.

features.title: Tools for every aspect of your training
features.subtitle: Designed to help you be more consistent and efficient at the gym.

routines.title: Custom routines
routines.description: Create routines with days, blocks, supersets, tempo, and execution notes.

liveTracking.title: Real-time tracking
liveTracking.description: Record weight, reps, and rest during your workout.

progress.title: Progress tracking
progress.description: Visualize your progress with weight, volume, and estimated 1RM charts.

ai.title: AI-powered creation
ai.description: Generate personalized routines with artificial intelligence based on your goals.

history.title: Session history
history.description: Review all your past sessions with full detail.

bodyMetrics.title: Body metrics
bodyMetrics.description: Track your body weight and measurements to monitor your composition.

create.title: Create your routine
create.description: Design your routine manually, use a template, or generate one with AI.

train.title: Train and record
train.description: Start a session and log each set with weight, reps, and rest.

analyze.title: Analyze your progress
analyze.description: Review your history, personal records, and progress over time.

cta.title: Start training better today
cta.subtitle: Free, no credit card required. Create your account in seconds.
